description.value:
This staff is made of silver, with a shimmering sphere of dawnsilver at either end. One end features a golden snake wrapped around the staff and cradling the larger of these two dawnsilver spheres. While wielding the staff, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to checks to identify transmutation magic.

The staff also functions as a +2 greater striking staff.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sigil]{Sigil}
  • 1st @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Fleet Step]{Fleet Step}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Jump]{Jump}
  • 2nd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enlarge]{Enlarge}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Humanoid Form]{Humanoid Form}
  • 3rd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Feet to Fins]{Feet to Fins}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Jump]{Jump} (rank 3)
  • 4th @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Vapor Form]{Vapor Form}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Shape Stone]{Shape Stone}
  • 5th @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Humanoid Form]{Humanoid Form} (rank 5)
  • 6th @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Cursed Metamorphosis]{Cursed Metamorphosis}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dragon Form]{Dragon Form}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Petrify]{Petrify}
A silver staff with shimmering spheres of pale metal at either end, one cradled by a golden snake.
